meta.title: InfoWeb | Website as a Service
meta.description: InfoWeb provides managed websites for small businesses: domain, maintenance, bookings, dashboards, payments, and CMS access.

hero.eyebrow: Website as a Service for small businesses
hero.title: Your complete digital presence, managed for one monthly price.
hero.subtitle: InfoWeb builds, hosts, updates, and improves your website so your business looks professional online without hiring an internal tech team.

card.label: Managed site plan
card.item3: Upgrade path for payments and teams
card.note: Restaurants, clinics, local services, freelancers, and shops.

proof.item3: Built and maintained by a software engineer

pricing.title: Pick the level of digital presence your business needs.
pricing.subtitle: Start with a professional site and grow into bookings, dashboards, payments, and internal users when the business needs it.

basic.name: Basic
basic.description: A clean informative website with domain and maintenance included.

professional.name: Professional
professional.description: Everything in Basic plus booking flows and a simple business dashboard.

premium.name: Premium
premium.description: For businesses that need payments, customer workflows, and team access.

custom.name: Custom
custom.description: Need integrations, automations, or a custom web app? Scope it directly with the developer.

offer.badge: Early bird: €10 lifetime discount for the first clients
offer.label: Early bird offer
offer.title: €10 lifetime discount for the first clients.
offer.copy: Lock the discount while you keep an active monthly plan.

addon.label: Optional add-on
addon.title: +€15/mo for CMS access.
addon.copy: Edit selected website content yourself while InfoWeb keeps the technical layer managed.

caseStudies.title: Case studies: typical InfoWeb setups for real businesses.

card1.title: Menu, reservations, and local SEO
card1.copy: Example setup: a fast site with menu highlights, reservation CTA, opening hours, and Google-ready structure.

card2.title: Services, bookings, and patient leads
card2.copy: Example setup: service pages, team credibility, booking requests, and clear contact routing.

card3.title: Quote requests and simple dashboard
card3.copy: Example setup: a conversion-focused site for trades, cleaners, tutors, or consultants, with optional dashboard.

developer.title: A full-stack developer, not a faceless template vendor.
developer.copy1: I manage InfoWeb directly. I am Henrique Sousa, founder and full-stack developer at Sousa Dev, a Software Engineer with a Master's degree in Robotics and Intelligent Systems and a track record of building public, practical software.
developer.copy2: My first public project, Sao Miguel Bus, solved a real transport information problem in the Azores. I bring that same engineering mindset here: reliable systems, clear communication, and websites that keep working after launch.

contact.title: Get a managed website ready for real customers.
contact.copy: Send the basics and you will get a practical next step: plan recommendation, timeline, and what is needed to launch.

form.name: Name
form.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your business, preferred plan, and launch timing.

footer.tagline: Managed websites for small businesses: domain, hosting, updates, and a clear path to grow online.
